ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "gloss" TEXT /* Gloss of the concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concept */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "part_of_speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part of speech */,
  "parent_concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent concept */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the concept */,
  "antonyms" TEXT /* List of antonyms for the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepts_parent_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepts_part_of_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_of_speech_id") REFERENCES parts_of_speech ("part_of_speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepts_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepticon_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word in the language */,
  "gloss" TEXT /* Gloss of the word */,
  "stability" INTEGER /* Stability score of the entry */,
  "phonetic_representation" TEXT /* Phonetic representation of the word */,
  "example_sentences" TEXT /* Example sentences for the word */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Etymology of the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepticon_entries_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepticon_entries_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  "family" TEXT /* Language family */,
  "script" TEXT /* Script used in the language */,
  "dialects" TEXT /* List of dialects for the language */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "parent_domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent domain */,
  "related_concepts" TEXT /* List of related concepts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_parent_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_of_speech" (
  "part_of_speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part of speech */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the part of speech */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part of speech */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of words that belong to this part of speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_of_speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "date_granted" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepticon_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepticon_versions_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity score */,
  "concept_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first concept */,
  "concept_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second concept */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two concepts */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to compute the similarity score */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the similarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_similarity_concept_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id2") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_similarity_concept_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id1") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date the activity was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
